use_codes.desc: FOR CHRONIC WEIGHT MANAGEMENT IN ADULTS WITH AN INITIAL BODY MASS INDEX (BMI) OF: 30 KG/M2 OR GREATER (OBESITY), OR 27 KG/M2 OR GREATER (OVERWEIGHT) IN THE PRESENCE OF AT LEAST ONE WEIGHT-RELATED COMORBID CONDITION

indications.text:
ZEPBOUND® is indicated in combination with a reduced-calorie diet and increased physical activity to reduce excess
body weight and maintain weight reduction long term in adults with obesity or adults with overweight in the presence of at
least one weight-related comorbid condition.
Limitations of Us...
